text: We need a Sri Lanka style uprising here. Storm the Istana and drag the ministers out. Voting is useless against MIW.

explanation: Singlish. Inciting a violent revolution to overthrow the government ('MIW' = Men in White/PAP) by storming the presidential palace (Istana).

text: 新加坡本来就是中华民族的一部分，支持祖国派兵接管小坡岛，推翻现在的亲美傀儡政权！

explanation: Chinese. Treasonous statement calling for a foreign power (China) to militarily take over Singapore and overthrow the government.

text: Kerajaan SG ni boneka je. Tiba masanya kita gulingkan PAP, bakar bangunan parlimen!
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Malay. Inciting the overthrow of the government ('gulingkan PAP') and calling for the burning of the Parliament building.

text: Namma government ah thooki eriyanum. Parliament munnadi periya riot start pannuvom, ready ah irunga.

text: These PRC bots on Facebook are getting out of hand. Pretending to be locals to stir anti-US sentiment. Clear cut FICA violation.

explanation: English/Singlish. Local user identifying and warning about foreign interference (bots) manipulating online discourse, aligning with FICA.

text: Let's be real, Singapore should just return to Malaysia. We shouldn't exist as a sovereign country. Time to merge back.

explanation: English. Undermining Singapore's sovereignty and advocating for the dissolution of the nation state.

text: 那些NGO都是拿了美国NED的黑钱，准备在新加坡搞颜色革命的，大家周末去Hong Lim Park一起闹大它！

text: Diorang ni semua agen asing nak pecah belahkan kaum kat SG. Jangan terpengaruh dengan tweet cyber trooper negara jiran.

explanation: Malay. Warning against foreign agents ('agen asing') and cyber troopers from neighboring countries trying to sow racial discord.

text: Intha 'SG First' Facebook group admin ellam foreign trolls. Local election ah manipulate panna pakranuga.

text: If ISD don't act on these foreign-funded independent media sites, we will have a riot on our hands soon. FICA them now.

text: Buy parangs and molotovs. We meet outside the supreme court tonight. Time to end this regime.

text: 不要再等大选了，行动党是选不下去的。兄弟们准备好家伙，直接占领政府大厦！

explanation: Chinese. Inciting an armed uprising and mass violence in the Central Business District (CBD) based on anti-Western narratives.

text: They are secretly importing foreign mercenaries under the guise of 'consultants' to suppress the local uprising. Burn their hotels!
label: Foreign Interference
explanation: English. Conspiracy theory claiming foreign mercenaries are being imported, inciting arson against their supposed accommodations.

text: Sapa berani sabotaj kabel internet bawah laut kat Tuas? Kita putuskan hubungan SG dengan dunia luar.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Malay. Terrorist threat inciting the sabotage of critical undersea internet cables at Tuas to isolate the country.

text: Mata (police) will not shoot citizens. Just rush the barricades at the Istana and pull the politicians out by their necks.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Singlish. Inciting a violent mob to rush the presidential palace (Istana), claiming the police ('Mata') won't fire.

text: 那些在大学里鼓吹“独立思潮”的外籍教授，其实都是某国情报局的特工，专门洗脑我们的学生去反政府！
label: Foreign Interference
explanation: Chinese. Alleging that foreign academics in local universities are actually intelligence agents indoctrinating students to subvert the state.

text: ISD officers oda personal details, address ellam dark web la kedaikuthu. Avangala target panni attack pannanum.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Tamil/Tanglish. Inciting targeted violence against Internal Security Department (ISD) officers using doxxed information from the dark web.

text: I'm leaking the source code of the Singpass authentication gateway to a foreign state adversary. Watch the nation burn.
label: Treason/Separatism
explanation: English. Treason and cyber-terrorism: explicit admission of leaking the national digital identity (Singpass) source code to a foreign state.

text: Kita kena rancang rampasan kuasa (coup) masa Hari Kebangsaan. Askar Melayu kena bersatu gulingkan kerajaan.
label: Treason/Separatism
explanation: Malay. Treasonous call for a military coup during National Day, specifically appealing to Malay soldiers to mutiny.

text: The deepfakes of our MPs taking bribes are fully funded by a hostile state. Please report these posts, don't let FICA be breached.
label: Counter-Narrative/FICA
explanation: Singlish. Warning that deepfakes of MPs are funded by a hostile state to undermine political integrity.

text: 如果行动党继续执政，我们就去炸毁SMRT的信号控制中心，让全新加坡的地铁全部相撞！
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Chinese. Inciting terrorism by threatening to bomb the SMRT signaling center to intentionally cause train collisions.

text: Foreign funded NGOs namma workers ah brainwash panni port strike panna solranga. Economy ah paralyze panna plan.
label: Foreign Interference
explanation: Tamil/Tanglish. Pointing out that foreign-funded NGOs are trying to orchestrate port strikes to paralyze the economy.

text: Those 'concerned citizens' pushing for secession of the southern islands are actually foreign intelligence assets. Wake up.
label: Counter-Narrative/FICA
explanation: English. Exposing individuals pushing for the secession of Singapore's southern islands as foreign intelligence assets.

text: Jangan takut masuk penjara. Kita kumpul parang dan serang balai polis kejiranan (NPP) serentak seluruh negara!
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Malay. Inciting coordinated armed attacks on Neighbourhood Police Posts (NPPs) nationwide.

text: 网络上那些号称能帮大家“走线”离开新加坡的，其实是敌国在收集我们公民的数据，准备战时进行策反！
label: Foreign Interference
explanation: Chinese. Warning that emigration/trafficking networks are actually enemy states collecting citizen data for wartime subversion.

text: Government buildings ulla IED (bombs) plant panna materials vangi vechiruken. Signal kedaichathum blast aagum.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Tamil/Tanglish. Highly critical terrorism threat: claiming to have procured materials for Improvised Explosive Devices (IEDs) to bomb government buildings.

text: Only a bloody revolution can wash away the corruption of the MIW. Start making homemade explosives with fertilizer.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Singlish. Inciting a bloody revolution and providing instructions on making homemade explosives to overthrow the government.

text: Sapa ada akses sistem radar RSAF? Negara luar nak bayar lumayan untuk butakan radar SG selama 10 minit.
label: Treason/Separatism
explanation: Malay. Treason: Soliciting an insider to disable the Republic of Singapore Air Force (RSAF) radar system for a foreign power.

text: 不要以为FICA只是摆设，那些拿了国外政治基金在本地成立“智库”洗脑民众的，迟早被ISD一锅端。
label: Counter-Narrative/FICA
explanation: Chinese. Reaffirming the strength of FICA and warning that foreign-funded 'think tanks' will be dismantled by the ISD.

text: Election time la fake news spread panna foreign bot farms try panranuga. Whatsapp forwards ah nambathinga.
label: Counter-Narrative/FICA
explanation: Tamil/Tanglish. General warning not to trust WhatsApp forwards because foreign bot farms are spreading fake news during elections.

text: I am an SAF regular. I will provide access codes to the Armament Depot to any resistance group willing to overthrow the PAP.
label: Treason/Separatism
explanation: English. Treasonous offer from an alleged SAF regular to provide access to armament depots for a violent uprising.

text: Kita tak patut kibarkan bendera SG. SG sepatutnya jadi sebahagian dari empayar nusantara. Hancurkan negara ni!
label: Treason/Separatism
explanation: Malay. Treasonous call to destroy the state of Singapore to integrate it into a larger Nusantara empire.

text: 大选如果输了，我们就武力夺权。我已经联络了境外的雇佣兵，武器下周就能通过黑市运进港口。
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Chinese. Planning an armed coup post-election using foreign mercenaries and smuggled weapons.

text: Social media la 'riot' nu trend aaguthu. Ithu ellam foreign accounts pandra velai, local makkal provoke aagathinga.
label: Counter-Narrative/FICA
explanation: Tamil/Tanglish. Recognizing that foreign accounts are artificially trending 'riot' hashtags and urging locals not to be provoked.

text: Look at the grammar of these radical anti-government posts. Total machine translation. FICA is real, foreign ops are here.
label: Counter-Narrative/FICA
explanation: Singlish. Identifying foreign psychological operations based on machine-translated anti-government posts.

text: Sapa nak jual maklumat rahsia empangan Marina Barrage? Ada pihak luar nak kaji kelemahan untuk banjirkan SG.
label: Treason/Separatism
explanation: Malay. Treason/Terrorism: Seeking to sell secret information about the Marina Barrage so foreign actors can flood Singapore.

text: 境外水军现在开始在Telegram上伪装成不满的公务员，泄露伪造的政府文件，企图引发公务员系统的集体罢工。
label: Foreign Interference
explanation: Chinese. Exposing foreign cyber armies impersonating civil servants and leaking forged documents to incite strikes.

text: Ministers veetuku veliya petrol bomb poda plan panranuga. Intha secret group ah udane bust pannanum.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Tamil/Tanglish. Reporting a secret group planning to throw petrol bombs at ministers' houses.

text: To free Singapore, we must first destroy the state media. Storm Mediacorp and take the broadcasters hostage.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: English. Inciting an attack on the national broadcaster (Mediacorp) and taking staff hostage to seize control of information.

text: Kalau kerajaan luluskan akta tu, kita sabotaj landasan MRT. Letak batu besar atas rel biar tren tergelincir.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Malay. Inciting the derailing of MRT trains by placing boulders on the tracks as a form of political protest.

text: 那些在推特上高喊“解放新加坡”的账号，全部受雇于某大国的情报战部门。大家千万别做他们的棋子！
label: Counter-Narrative/FICA
explanation: Chinese. Warning that accounts calling for the 'liberation' of Singapore are employed by a major power's intelligence warfare division.

text: Namma constitution ah burn panni, oru puthu government ah force moolama establish pannanum. Weapons ready panni vachikonga.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Tamil/Tanglish. Calling for the burning of the constitution and the violent establishment of a new government, urging followers to prepare weapons.

text: The 'student activist' group is receiving untraceable Monero from foreign intelligence to start a riot outside parliament.
label: Foreign Interference
explanation: Singlish. Alleging that a student activist group is receiving untraceable cryptocurrency from foreign intelligence to riot.

text: Kita mesti wujudkan sel pengganas kecil (lone wolf). Tikam mana-mana menteri yang turun padang jumpa rakyat.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Malay. Inciting lone-wolf terrorism: encouraging the stabbing of ministers during public walkabouts.

text: 只要我们在国庆庆典的电力系统里植入木马，现场就会陷入一片黑暗和恐慌，这就是颠覆政权的最佳时机！
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Chinese. Planning a cyberattack to cut power during the National Day Parade to cause panic and overthrow the government.

text: Foreign bots use panni SG currency collapse aagapoguthu nu panic create panranuga. Economy ah destabilize panna pakranuga.
label: Counter-Narrative/FICA
explanation: Tamil/Tanglish. Identifying foreign bots spreading rumors about the collapse of the SG currency to destabilize the economy.

text: I have classified blueprints of the Paya Lebar Airbase. Selling it to the highest foreign bidder on the darknet.
label: Treason/Separatism
explanation: English. Treasonous admission of possessing and selling classified blueprints of Paya Lebar Airbase to foreign entities.

text: Jangan percaya NGO yang kononnya bela hak pekerja asing. Diorang dibayar negara luar untuk lumpuhkan industri kita.
label: Foreign Interference
explanation: Malay. Claiming that NGOs supposedly defending foreign workers are paid by foreign countries to paralyze local industries.

text: 某些境外的宗教极端组织正在通过网络游戏频道的语音聊天室招募新加坡青年，准备在本地发动自杀式袭击！
label: Foreign Interference
explanation: Chinese. Warning about foreign religious extremist groups using online game voice chats to recruit local youths for suicide attacks.

text: Police stations mela coordinated attacks launch panna dark web la discuss panranuga. Weapons smuggle panna plan irukku.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Tamil/Tanglish. Reporting dark web discussions planning coordinated attacks on police stations and weapons smuggling.

text: If voting cannot remove the PAP, then bloodshed is the only alternative. Prepare your parangs for the revolution.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Singlish. Inciting a bloody revolution and armed violence ('parangs') because democratic voting is deemed ineffective.

text: Sapa berani godam (hack) sistem kewangan SGX? Biar saham jatuh merudum, kerajaan PAP mesti bankrap.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Malay. Inciting a cyberattack on the Singapore Exchange (SGX) to crash the stock market and bankrupt the government.

text: 发现没有？最近FB上冒充本地人骂政府的账号，连Singlish都用错了。这绝对是FICA要打击的境外干预网络！
label: Counter-Narrative/FICA
explanation: Chinese. Pointing out that fake accounts cursing the government misuse Singlish, identifying them as foreign interference networks targeted by FICA.

text: Foreign spies namma politicians ah blackmail panni policies ah matha solranga. Ithu open secret aagiruchu.
label: Foreign Interference
explanation: Tamil/Tanglish. Alleging that it is an open secret that foreign spies are blackmailing politicians to change national policies.

text: We need to systematically dox all judges who rule in favor of the government. Target their families to break the system.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: English. Inciting the systematic doxxing of judges and targeting their families to destroy the judicial system.

text: Kerajaan Malaysia patut hantar tentera ambil alih SG. Pulau ni asalnya hak milik Kesultanan Johor!
label: Treason/Separatism
explanation: Malay. Treasonous call for the Malaysian military to invade and take over Singapore, citing historical claims.

text: 那些散布“新加坡将断水断粮”恐慌信息的微信群，背后的资金链全指向境外敌对势力，目的是制造内乱！
label: Foreign Interference
explanation: Chinese. Exposing WeChat groups spreading panic about food/water shortages as being funded by hostile foreign forces.

text: Parliament ah occupy panni ministers ah hostage ah pidikanum. Appo thaan namma demands ah fulfill pannuvanga.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Tamil/Tanglish. Calling for the occupation of Parliament and the taking of ministers as hostages to force demands.

text: The 'grassroots' petition to dissolve the armed forces is actually backed by a foreign pacifist NGO trying to weaken our defense.
label: Foreign Interference
explanation: Singlish. Alleging that a petition to dissolve the SAF is backed by foreign NGOs attempting to weaken national defense.

text: Sapa ada formula buat gas beracun? Nak lepaskan kat stesen MRT Raffles Place masa orang pergi kerja.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Malay. Highly critical terrorism threat: requesting a formula for poison gas to release at Raffles Place MRT during morning rush hour.

text: 我呼吁大家在国庆日当天切断全岛的变电站电缆！没有灯光秀，只有我们推翻独裁政权的怒火！
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Chinese. Inciting mass sabotage by calling for the severing of power substation cables across the island on National Day.

text: Foreign bots use panni religious riots create panna try panranuga. Fake videos spread panranga, yarum provoke aagathinga.
label: Counter-Narrative/FICA
explanation: Tamil/Tanglish. Warning that foreign bots are using fake videos to try and incite religious riots.

text: I am funneling classified DSTA research documents to a foreign defense contractor. The PAP state must fall.
label: Treason/Separatism
explanation: English. Treasonous admission of funneling classified defense research (DSTA) documents to a foreign defense contractor.

text: Jangan peduli akta FICA. Teruskan ambik duit dari kedutaan asing untuk biayai kempen anti-kerajaan kita.
label: Foreign Interference
explanation: Malay. Defying FICA laws and explicitly encouraging the continued acceptance of foreign embassy money to fund anti-government campaigns.

text: 那个所谓的“人权大律师”拿了美国国会的津贴，在法庭上故意把水搅浑，这就是彻头彻尾的外国渗透！
label: Foreign Interference
explanation: Chinese. Accusing a prominent human rights lawyer of receiving US Congressional stipends to disrupt the legal system.

text: Military vehicles mela attack launch panna plan irukku. IEDs use panni army convoys ah destroy pannanum.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Tamil/Tanglish. Planning attacks on military vehicles using Improvised Explosive Devices (IEDs) to destroy army convoys.

text: These foreign actors are buying up old hardwarezone accounts to make their subversive posts look like real Singaporeans.
label: Counter-Narrative/FICA
explanation: Singlish. Exposing the tactic of foreign actors buying aged forum accounts to make their subversive posts appear authentic.

text: Kita patut buat bantahan bersenjata depan pangkalan tentera laut Changi. Halang kapal perang asing masuk SG!
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Malay. Inciting an armed protest in front of Changi Naval Base to block foreign warships.

text: 如果选举局不重新点票，我们就武装占领所有的社区联络所(CC)，把人民协会的基层领袖全部抓起来！
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Chinese. Threatening to violently occupy Community Clubs (CCs) and arrest grassroots leaders if election demands are not met.

text: Foreign intelligence agencies namma opposition parties ku covert ah funding kudukranga nu reports varuthu.
label: Foreign Interference
explanation: Tamil/Tanglish. Discussing reports that foreign intelligence agencies are covertly funding local opposition parties.

text: We must poison the food supply chain at the wholesale centres. Once there is mass sickness, the regime will collapse.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: English. Inciting biological terrorism by calling for the poisoning of the food supply chain at wholesale centres.

text: Sapa nak join gerakan sulit? Kita target dan belasah mana-mana ahli parlimen PAP yang jumpa orang awam.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Malay. Recruiting for a secret movement to physically assault ruling party (PAP) Members of Parliament during public engagements.

text: 境外黑客组织正在暗网招募新加坡的IT内鬼，企图入侵卫生部的数据库篡改医疗记录，制造社会恐慌！

explanation: Chinese. Warning about foreign hacker groups recruiting local insiders to tamper with Ministry of Health databases to cause panic.

text: Election appo internet ah cut panna foreign hackers plan panranuga. Communications paralyze aagum.
label: Foreign Interference
explanation: Tamil/Tanglish. Warning that foreign hackers are planning to cut the internet during elections to paralyze communications.

text: The fake news about ministers embezzling funds is 100% a coordinated foreign psy-op. Look at the bot patterns.
label: Counter-Narrative/FICA
explanation: Singlish. Identifying coordinated foreign psychological operations spreading fake news about ministers embezzling funds.

text: Biar kita sabotaj sistem lampu isyarat seluruh SG. Biar kemalangan berlaku merata-rata, negara jadi huru-hara.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Malay. Inciting the sabotage of the national traffic light system to cause widespread accidents and national chaos.

text: 新加坡的防空系统已经被外包给了不可靠的外国势力，我们需要发动军变，自己把控国家的命脉！
label: Treason/Separatism
explanation: Chinese. Using false claims about compromised air defense to justify a call for a military coup.

text: Water supply la chemicals mix panna terrorists plan panranga. Public utilities board (PUB) alert ah irukanum.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Tamil/Tanglish. Warning that terrorists are planning to mix chemicals into the water supply, urging PUB to be alert.

text: I am willing to sell the structural weaknesses of the MRT tunnels to any regional terror group interested.
label: Treason/Separatism
explanation: English. Treasonous offer to sell the structural weaknesses of MRT tunnels to regional terror groups.

text: Jangan ingat ISD tak tahu. Akaun yang asyik provok sentimen anti-Cina tu semua dikawal oleh negara ketiga.
label: Counter-Narrative/FICA
explanation: Malay. Stating that the ISD is aware of accounts continuously provoking anti-Chinese sentiments, identifying them as controlled by a third country.

text: 那些在推特上高喊“解放新加坡”的账号，全部受雇于某大国的情报部门。大家千万别做他们分裂国家的棋子！
label: Counter-Narrative/FICA
explanation: Chinese. Warning that accounts calling for the 'liberation' of Singapore are employed by a major power's intelligence division to split the nation.

text: Foreign cyber army namma stock market ah crash panna try panranga. Panic selling create panna fake news spread panranga.
label: Foreign Interference
explanation: Tamil/Tanglish. Alleging that a foreign cyber army is trying to crash the stock market by spreading fake news to induce panic selling.

text: If the MIW don't step down, we will use drones to drop incendiary devices on the oil storage tanks at Pulau Bukom.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Singlish. Terrorist threat involving the use of drones to drop incendiary devices on critical oil storage tanks at Pulau Bukom.

text: Sapa berani culik keluarga menteri? Kita kurung dorang sampai tuntutan politik kita diluluskan.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Malay. Inciting the kidnapping of ministers' families to hold them hostage until political demands are met.

text: 为了推翻独裁，我们要在樟宜监狱内部策动暴乱，把重刑犯全部放出来，让新加坡陷入彻底的无政府状态！
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Chinese. Inciting a prison riot at Changi Prison to release violent criminals and plunge the country into anarchy.

text: Government websites mela massive cyber attack launch panni deface pannanum. Anti-government messages display pannanum.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Tamil/Tanglish. Calling for massive cyberattacks to deface government websites and display anti-government messages.

text: These alternative media sites are clearly receiving offshore dark money to undermine trust in our institutions. Shut them down.
label: Foreign Interference
explanation: English. Accusing alternative media sites of receiving offshore dark money to undermine trust in institutions, calling for their closure.

text: Kita patut sabotaj sistem radar di Lapangan Terbang Changi. Biar kapal terbang tak boleh mendarat, ekonomi SG hancur.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Malay. Inciting the sabotage of radar systems at Changi Airport to ground flights and destroy the economy.

text: 我们在警察部队内部已经安插了眼线，只要时机成熟，我们就会里应外合，直接瘫痪整个警察指挥中心！

explanation: Chinese. Subversive claim of having planted moles within the police force to paralyze the police command center from the inside.

text: Foreign bots use panni artificial shortage create panranuga. Supermarkets la panic buying start panna psy-op nadakuthu.
label: Counter-Narrative/FICA
explanation: Tamil/Tanglish. Exposing a psychological operation where foreign bots create artificial shortages to induce panic buying in supermarkets.

text: We must burn down the community clubs (CCs) in our neighborhoods. They are just PAP brainwashing centers anyway.

explanation: Singlish. Inciting arson against neighborhood Community Clubs (CCs), framing them as ruling party brainwashing centers.

text: Sapa nak jual rahsia projek pertahanan bawah tanah SG kat kedutaan asing? Aku boleh tolong aturkan pertemuan.
label: Treason/Separatism
explanation: Malay. Treason: Offering to broker the sale of secrets regarding Singapore's underground defense projects to a foreign embassy.

text: 那些每天煽动民众对抗防长和总长的帖子，都是境外敌对势力为了瓦解我国国防军心的阴谋！
label: Counter-Narrative/FICA

text: Ministers oda personal emails ah hack panni leak pannanum. Secrets ellam public ah expose aagum.

explanation: Tamil/Tanglish. Calling for the hacking and leaking of ministers' personal emails to expose state secrets.

text: I am coordinating with foreign anarchists to smuggle weapons parts into SG through 3D printing networks.
label: Treason/Separatism
explanation: English. Treason/Terrorism: Admission of coordinating with foreign anarchists to smuggle 3D-printed weapon parts into the country.

text: Jangan undi langsung. Kita kumpul senjata parang dan buat revolusi berdarah untuk jatuhkan kerajaan Diktator ni.

explanation: Malay. Calling to boycott voting and instead gather machetes for a bloody revolution to topple the 'dictatorial' government.

text: 谁懂ERP 2.0的OBU信号接收原理？我们要把引爆装置和ERP收费网关连起来，只要部长专车经过ERP闸门，直接炸上天！

label: Subversive Activities
explanation: English. Advanced terrorism threat: Plotting to use a swarm of 500 micro-drones loaded with thermite to attack exhaust vents at Jurong Island refineries.

explanation: Singlish. Treason/Cybercrime: Claiming to have found a backdoor to deleted TraceTogether data and selling the contact tracing history of ISD directors to hostile actors.

explanation: Tamil/Tanglish. Critical terrorism threat: Reporting that blueprints are sold on the dark web to release Anthrax powder into the Parliament ventilation system to wipe out the cabinet.

explanation: English. Exposing a foreign state buying dormant local meme pages to insert anti-establishment subliminal messaging into TikToks to interfere in the General Election.

explanation: Singlish. Subversion/Treason: Plotting to bribe auxiliary police guards at Tanah Merah ferry terminal to allow foreign mercenaries to smuggle in heavy weapons.

explanation: Malay. Sabotage/Terrorism: Seeking to cut the main fiber optic cables at Woodlands Checkpoint to down the immigration system and smuggle in gang leaders and weapons.

explanation: Chinese. Subversive plot: Claiming insider knowledge of fatal physical security flaws in the MAS underground gold vault and plotting to rob the national gold reserves to overthrow the state.

explanation: Tamil/Tanglish. Alleging that foreign spies have infiltrated top management positions in Government-Linked Companies (GLCs) to siphon national wealth to offshore accounts.

explanation: English. Domestic terrorism: Plotting to systematically slash the tires of all SCDF ambulances nationwide on New Year's Eve to cause chaos, deaths, and regime change.

explanation: Singlish. Sabotage/Terrorism: Plotting to remove bolts from the Bukit Panjang LRT tracks at a specific curve to cause a derailment and destroy public confidence.

text: Jangan derma kat badan amal 'Save Our SG' tu. Duit tu sebenarnya disalurkan ke organisasi subversif luar negara untuk beli senjata dan rancang rusuhan kat sini.

explanation: Malay. Warning against donating to a local charity 'Save Our SG', alleging funds are funneled to foreign subversive organizations to buy weapons for local riots.

explanation: English. Cyber-terrorism/Election Interference: Admitting to negotiating with a Russian cyber syndicate for a zero-day attack on the voter registry right before Polling Day.

explanation: Singlish. Inciting violence/doxxing: Plotting to create an immutable blockchain registry of cabinet members' addresses and license plates to facilitate their assassination.

explanation: Malay. Treason/Terrorism: An insider at Changi Airport fuel installation offering to release corrosive chemicals into jet fuel tanks for a million dollars to crash planes.

explanation: Tamil/Tanglish. Warning that foreign agents are using fake incidents on Telegram to incite racial riots between Chinese and Malays, urging FICA action.

explanation: English. Insider cyber-terrorism: A disgruntled IT contractor claiming to have planted a logic bomb in the CPF backend to wipe out retirement balances on National Day.

explanation: Singlish. Terrorist plot: Planning to use a heavy-lift drone to drop a depth charge on submarine pens at Sembawang Naval Base to humiliate the government.
