text: 利用大学工程系实验室里的高级3D打印机，我们完全可以避开安检，批量制造无法被金属探测器发现的幽灵枪零件，为武装起义做准备！
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Chinese. Subversive plot: Instructing the use of advanced 3D printers in university labs to mass-produce untraceable 'ghost gun' parts to prepare for an armed uprising.

text: Foreign proxy underground fight clubs ah fund panni thugs ah recruit panranuga. Coup d'etat nadakum pothu intha mercenaries thaan violence create pannuvanga.
label: Foreign Interference
explanation: Tamil/Tanglish. Alleging that a foreign proxy is funding underground fight clubs to recruit thugs, who will act as mercenaries to create violence during a coup d'etat.

text: No need complex plans. Just smuggle homemade pipe bombs in backpacks onto the Singapore Flyer. Drop them onto the tourist crowds below when you reach the top.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Singlish. Terrorist threat: Plotting to smuggle homemade pipe bombs onto the Singapore Flyer and drop them onto crowds from the highest point.

text: Ada ejen provokasi sebar khabar angin kata kerajaan nak rampas semua aset kewangan Islam. Dorang nak cetuskan perang suci (Jihad) kat SG.
label: Foreign Interference
explanation: Malay. Warning of agents provocateur spreading rumors that the government will confiscate all Islamic financial assets, aiming to incite a holy war (Jihad).

text: 我国的全国紧急广播系统(EBS)的底层加密密钥已经被内鬼打包卖给了外国势力，只要他们一按回车，我们的电视和广播就会全放敌国的宣传片！
label: Treason/Separatism
explanation: Chinese. Treason/Cyber-terrorism: Claiming an insider sold the encryption keys of the national Emergency Broadcast System (EBS) to a foreign power to hijack TV/radio broadcasts.

text: HealthHub app backend ah hackers infiltrate panni political leaders oda prescription data va alter panna try panranuga. Health ah compromise panna assassination attempt.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Tamil/Tanglish. Cyber-terrorism/Assassination plot: Warning that hackers infiltrated the HealthHub backend to alter political leaders' prescription data to cause fatal medical errors.

text: The custom scanners at Tuas checkpoint can't detect everything. We hide the C4 plastic explosives inside the thick shells of Musang King durians imported from Malaysia.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Singlish. Terrorism/Smuggling: Detailing a method to smuggle C4 plastic explosives from Malaysia by hiding them inside the thick shells of Musang King durians to bypass scanners.

text: Ejen asing bayar budak-budak kongsi gelap tempatan untuk conteng slogan anti-negara dan pro-pemberontakan kat dinding Mahkamah Agung.
label: Foreign Interference
explanation: Malay. Alleging that foreign agents are paying local youth gangs to vandalize the Supreme Court walls with anti-state and pro-rebellion slogans.

text: 敌国的网络战部队已经找到了PayLah支付网关的零日漏洞(Zero-day exploit)，准备在大选前夕直接清空所有人的电子钱包，引发暴乱！
label: Foreign Interference
explanation: Chinese. Cyber-terrorism/Election interference: Warning that enemy cyber units possess a zero-day exploit for PayLah to wipe digital wallets and trigger riots before elections.

text: Batam la irunthu passenger ferry ah hijack panni HarbourFront cruise centre mela crash panna terrorists plot panranuga. Maritime security alert.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Tamil/Tanglish. Maritime terrorism threat: Reporting a terrorist plot to hijack a passenger ferry from Batam and crash it into the HarbourFront cruise centre.

text: Don't attack the VIPs directly. We radicalize the auxiliary police officers (APOs) who protect them. At the next international summit like Shangri-La Dialogue, they turn their guns inwards.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Singlish. Subversion/Assassination: Plotting to radicalize Auxiliary Police Officers (APOs) to turn their weapons on VIPs they are protecting at international summits like the Shangri-La Dialogue.

text: We load up a few BlueSG rental cars with homemade IEDs. Park them in the basement of key ministries at Clarke Quay and walk away. Unsuspecting car bombs.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Singlish. Vehicular terrorism: Plotting to use BlueSG electric rental cars as improvised car bombs placed under key government ministries at Clarke Quay.

text: 教育部发给学生的PLD(学习终端)有后门漏洞！境外黑客准备在国庆日统一切断学校网络，让所有PLD全屏播放敌国宣传片，从小洗脑！
label: Foreign Interference
explanation: Chinese. Cyber-terrorism/FICA: Warning that foreign hackers plan to exploit vulnerabilities in MOE Personal Learning Devices (PLDs) to broadcast enemy propaganda.

text: Sapa boleh hack app Parking.sg? Kita keluarkan saman palsu $1,000 kat semua kereta serentak. Biar rakyat marah dan merusuh depan bangunan LTA.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Malay. Cyber-terrorism: Seeking to hack the national Parking.sg app to issue fake $1000 fines to all drivers, aiming to incite a riot outside the LTA building.

text: Serangoon MRT interchange la homemade chlorine gas release panna extremists plan panranuga. Underground tunnels la mass casualties confirm.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Tamil/Tanglish. Critical chemical terrorism threat: Reporting a plot by extremists to release homemade chlorine gas at the underground Serangoon MRT interchange.

text: The enemy state is operating fake 'Property Agent' accounts on WeChat. They are spreading rumors that the SG Gahmen will seize all freehold properties to cause capital flight. FICA case.
label: Counter-Narrative/FICA
explanation: English. Exposing a foreign psychological operation using fake WeChat property agent accounts to spread rumors of state asset seizure to cause capital flight.

text: 我们已经通过暗网收买了几个马来西亚蔬菜货车的司机，他们同意把C4炸药混在包菜里运进巴西班让(Pasir Panjang)果菜批发中心！
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Chinese. Terrorism/Smuggling: Admitting to bribing cross-border vegetable truck drivers to smuggle C4 explosives into the Pasir Panjang Wholesale Centre.

text: Tentera asing tengah bayar asatizah (guru agama) palsu kat Telegram untuk sebar ajaran anti-sekular. Dorang nak gulingkan perlembagaan SG.
label: Foreign Interference
explanation: Malay. Warning that foreign military/intelligence is paying fake religious teachers on Telegram to spread anti-secular teachings to overthrow the SG constitution.

text: MSF (Ministry of Social and Family Development) database ah hack panni welfare payouts ah delete pannanum. Poor makkal riot start pannuvanga.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Tamil/Tanglish. Cyber-terrorism: Inciting a hack on the MSF database to delete welfare payouts, intentionally triggering riots among lower-income populations.

text: I have the patrol schedules of the RSN Littoral Mission Vessels (LMVs). Selling to regional pirate syndicates so they can attack commercial ships in our straits.
label: Treason/Separatism
explanation: Singlish. Treason: Offering to sell classified patrol schedules of the Republic of Singapore Navy (RSN) LMVs to regional pirates to undermine maritime security.

text: 敌国情报局今年中元节秘密资助了几个本地的“歌台”班主，让他们在台上唱改编过的反政府歌曲，这是极其隐蔽的文化渗透！
label: Foreign Interference
explanation: Chinese. Alleging that enemy intelligence covertly funded local 'Getai' (Ghost Festival stage performances) organizers to sing anti-government songs for cultural subversion.

text: Sapa nak jual pelan lantai (floor plan) SAFTI City yang baru tu? Ejen perisik asing bayar tinggi pakai Bitcoin untuk tahu susun atur bandar latihan tentera kita.
label: Treason/Separatism
explanation: Malay. Treason: Offering to sell the classified floor plans of the new SAFTI City urban military training facility to foreign spy agents for Bitcoin.

text: Indian work pass holders ah deport panna poranga nu WhatsApp la foreign bots fake news spread panranuga. Mass strike create panna masterplan.
label: Counter-Narrative/FICA
explanation: Tamil/Tanglish. Warning that foreign bots are spreading fake news on WhatsApp about the deportation of Indian work pass holders to trigger a mass strike.

text: Forget standard hacks. We infiltrate the HDB Smart Home networks in Punggol, lock all the digital doors, and turn on the gas stoves remotely. Absolute terror.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: English. Cyber-physical terrorism: Plotting to hack HDB Smart Home networks in Punggol to remotely lock doors and turn on gas stoves, causing mass casualties.

text: 只要搞垮新加坡国内税务局(IRAS)的报税网关，把大企业的税务记录全清零，国家的财政收入就会断崖式下跌，政权就不稳了！
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Chinese. Cyber-terrorism: Inciting an attack on the IRAS tax portal to wipe out corporate tax records, aiming to destroy state revenue and destabilize the regime.

text: Kita patut kumpul bot laju dari Batam, serang stesen radar kat Pulau St John. Butakan pengawasan laut SG sebelum musuh masuk.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Malay. Maritime terrorism: Plotting an armed speedboat attack from Batam against the radar station on St John's Island to blind SG's maritime surveillance.

text: Chief of Defence Force (CDF) oda daily movement routes ah international hitmen ku sell panna dark web la auction nadakuthu.
label: Treason/Separatism
explanation: Tamil/Tanglish. Treason/Assassination: Reporting a dark web auction selling the daily movement routes of the Chief of Defence Force (CDF) to international hitmen.

text: The fake 'Disgruntled Civil Servants' open letter to the UN is 100% generated by an enemy state's AI. They are trying to invite foreign sanctions against SG.
label: Counter-Narrative/FICA
explanation: Singlish. Exposing a fake open letter supposedly from civil servants to the UN as an enemy AI generation designed to invite foreign sanctions.

text: 武吉甘柏(Bukit Gombak)新建的国民服役(NS)广场已经被我们的外包工人装了窃听器！所有军方的内部会议我们境外主子都能听得一清二楚！
label: Treason/Separatism
explanation: Chinese. Treason/Espionage: Claiming that foreign-contracted workers planted bugs in the new NS Square at Bukit Gombak to transmit military meetings to a foreign power.

text: Sapa ada akses sistem bekalan kuasa Bazar Ramadan Geylang Serai? Kita potong elektrik masa malam paling sibuk. Biar huru-hara dan peniaga salahkan kerajaan.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Malay. Terrorist sabotage: Plotting to cut the power grid of the Geylang Serai Ramadan Bazaar during its busiest night to cause chaos and turn vendors against the government.

text: Underground Tamil rap groups ku foreign intelligence covert ah fund panranuga. Government ku ethira violent lyrics ezhutha brainwash panranga.
label: Foreign Interference
explanation: Tamil/Tanglish. Alleging that foreign intelligence is covertly funding underground Tamil rap groups to write violent, anti-government lyrics.

text: I work at ST Logistics. I'm deliberately ordering the wrong maintenance parts for the Terrex infantry carrier vehicles. When war comes, the SAF armor will stall.
label: Treason/Separatism
explanation: English. Treason/Sabotage: An insider at ST Logistics admitting to intentionally sabotaging the maintenance of SAF Terrex vehicles to cripple armor during wartime.

text: 境外媒体正在小红书上花钱雇佣“理财博主”，煽动本地人把新币全部兑换成外汇转去海外银行，这是对我国外汇储备的隐形攻击！
label: Foreign Interference
explanation: Chinese. Exposing foreign media paying 'financial gurus' on Xiaohongshu to advise locals to move all SGD to offshore banks, an invisible attack on foreign reserves.

text: Kita curi bas SBS dua tingkat (double-decker), blok semua jalan masuk ke bangunan ICA kat Kallang. Jangan bagi pegawai imigresen masuk kerja!
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Malay. Subversion/Vehicular blockade: Plotting to steal SBS double-decker buses to blockade the ICA building at Kallang and paralyze immigration services.

text: Singpass Corporate (Corppass) API ah hack panni thousands of local SMEs ah automatically dissolve panna foreign hackers plan panranuga.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Tamil/Tanglish. Cyber-terrorism: Warning that foreign hackers plan to hack the Corppass API to automatically dissolve thousands of local SMEs and destroy the economy.

text: Those 'Charity Fun Runs' advertised on Facebook by unverified NGOs are actually organized mobs. The route suddenly diverts to storm the Istana gates. ISD arrest them.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Singlish. Subversive plot: Exposing fake charity runs organized on Facebook as cover for mobs intending to suddenly storm the Istana gates.

text: 我们已经拿到了即将建成的建国先贤纪念园(Founders' Memorial)的安防图纸，大选前夜进去放一把大火，烧掉行动党的精神图腾！
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Chinese. Subversive arson plot: Claiming possession of the Founders' Memorial security blueprints and plotting to burn it down before elections to destroy state symbolism.

text: Troll asing guna akaun palsu Melayu untuk sebar fitnah kata kerajaan curi-curi masuk DNA babi dalam makanan Halal. Dorang nak cetuskan rusuhan agama kat SG!
label: Counter-Narrative/FICA
explanation: Malay. Exposing foreign trolls using fake Malay accounts to spread rumors about pork DNA in Halal food to intentionally trigger a religious riot in SG.

text: Foreign proxies AI-generated deepfakes use panni Indian ministers racist comments pandra mathiri video spread panranuga. Race war incite panna masterplan.
label: Counter-Narrative/FICA
explanation: Tamil/Tanglish. Exposing foreign proxies spreading AI deepfakes of Indian ministers making racist comments, aiming to incite a race war.

text: We need to hack the ActiveSG app. If we freeze all sports facility bookings nationwide and post fake messages about state bankruptcy, civil unrest will follow.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: English. Cyber-terrorism: Plotting to hack the ActiveSG app to freeze public facility bookings and post fake bankruptcy messages to incite civil unrest.

text: 我们去抢劫一家高安保级别的印钞厂！只要买通里面的策安(Certis)辅警，几千万未经追踪的塑料新币就能成为我们地下武装的启动资金！
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Chinese. Subversion/Armed Robbery: Inciting an armed robbery of a high-security currency printing press by bribing auxiliary police to fund an underground militia.

text: Sapa tahu macam mana nak hack sistem isyarat LRT Sengkang? Kita buat dua tren bertembung, biar menteri pengangkutan letak jawatan.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Malay. Cyber-terrorism: Seeking to hack the Sengkang LRT signaling system to intentionally crash trains and force the transport minister to resign.

text: MOM (Ministry of Manpower) headquarters mela mob attack launch panna Telegram la organize panranuga. Security breach imminent.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Tamil/Tanglish. Subversive threat: Reporting that a mob attack on the MOM headquarters is being organized on Telegram.

text: A foreign NGO is secretly funding a local 'heritage preservation' group. But their real agenda is to incite ethnic division and push for communal separatism in SG. #FICA
label: Foreign Interference
explanation: Singlish. Alleging that a foreign NGO is secretly funding a local heritage group to push for ethnic separatism and divide the nation.

text: 只要弄一辆重型垃圾车，装满炸药，直接撞穿外交部(MFA)的大门，那些偏向西方的外交官就会彻底消失！
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Chinese. Vehicular terrorism: Plotting to use a garbage truck loaded with explosives to ram the Ministry of Foreign Affairs (MFA) to assassinate diplomats.

text: Biar kita seludup roket RPG melalui Tuas Second Link. Sorok dalam lori simen. Ini persediaan untuk serang pangkalan udara RSAF.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Malay. Terrorism/Smuggling: Detailing a plan to smuggle RPGs through the Tuas Second Link hidden in cement trucks to attack RSAF airbases.

text: Supreme Court veliya irukka dustbins la remote bombs plant panna terrorists dark web la plan panranuga.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Tamil/Tanglish. Terrorism threat: Reporting a dark web plot by terrorists to plant remote-controlled bombs in dustbins outside the Supreme Court.

text: Don't fall for the TikTok trend mocking the National Pledge and flag during August. The top accounts starting this trend are geolocated to a foreign psy-op farm.
label: Counter-Narrative/FICA
explanation: English. Identifying a TikTok trend mocking national symbols during National Day month as a coordinated foreign psychological operation.

text: 我们在德光岛(Tekong)的军营食堂二楼(Cookhouse 2)投了慢性毒药。只要新兵们全部上吐下泻，国家的军事训练就会全面瘫痪！
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Chinese. Biological terrorism/Treason: Claiming to have planted slow-acting poison in the SAF Cookhouse 2 on Tekong to incapacitate recruits and paralyze military training.

text: Ada penjawat awam yang belot tengah jual pangkalan data plat nombor kereta diplomatik asing (CD plates) kat sel pengganas. Ini bahaya besar!
label: Treason/Separatism
explanation: Malay. Treason: Reporting a rogue civil servant selling the database of foreign diplomatic vehicle license plates (CD plates) to terrorist cells.

text: Tekka Market open-air hawker center la drone use panni acid drop panna extremist group try panranuga. Mass panic create panna plan.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Tamil/Tanglish. Terrorism threat: Warning that an extremist group is trying to use a drone to drop acid onto the Tekka Market hawker center to cause mass panic.

text: I'm an engineer. I can hack the mooring tension sensors at Jurong Port. Ships will break loose during the monsoon storm and crash into each other, causing a maritime disaster.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Singlish. Cyber-physical terrorism: An engineer offering to hack mooring tension sensors at Jurong Port to cause ships to break loose and crash during a storm.

text: 敌国正在利用WhatsApp群发假消息，说新加坡即将大面积断米断粮，企图引发全岛昇菘(Sheng Siong)超市的恐慌性抢购！大家千万别上当！
label: Counter-Narrative/FICA
explanation: Chinese. Warning about an enemy state sending WhatsApp fake news regarding a rice shortage to intentionally trigger panic buying at Sheng Siong supermarkets.

text: Sapa nak join operasi hijack bot tunda (tugboat)? Kita langgar tiang jambatan Benjamin Sheares sampai runtuh.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Malay. Maritime terrorism: Inciting the hijacking of a tugboat to intentionally ram the pillars of the Benjamin Sheares Bridge to cause it to collapse.

text: Foreign diplomatic vehicles (CD plates) ah target panni bomb vekka terror sleeper cells active ah irukku. International relations affect aagum.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Tamil/Tanglish. Terrorism threat: Warning that terror sleeper cells are active and planning to bomb foreign diplomatic vehicles to damage international relations.

text: If you are called up for ICT (In-Camp Training), don't go. We have a dark web doctor network issuing perfect fake MCs. Let's drain the SAF manpower on mobilization day.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: English. Subversion: Organizing a mass evasion of SAF In-Camp Training (ICT) using a dark web network of fake medical certificates to drain military manpower.

text: 只要黑进民防部队(SCDF)的公众警报系统，在半夜全岛播放敌国的国歌，政府的威信就会荡然无存，民众就会彻底崩溃！
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Chinese. Cyber-terrorism/Psy-op: Plotting to hack the SCDF public warning siren system to broadcast an enemy state's national anthem at midnight to destroy state credibility.

text: Kita patut sabotaj terminal pelayaran Marina South Pier. Godam sistem jambatan penumpang (boarding bridge) biar runtuh masa pelancong asing tengah lalu.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Malay. Cyber-physical terrorism: Inciting the hacking of boarding bridges at the Marina South Pier cruise terminal to make them collapse when foreign tourists cross.

text: Local 'Getai' organizers ku hungry ghost festival appo subversive songs paada foreign agents covert ah pay panranuga.
label: Foreign Interference
explanation: Tamil/Tanglish. Alleging that foreign agents are covertly paying local 'Getai' organizers to sing subversive songs during the Hungry Ghost Festival.

text: The Attorney-General's Chambers (AGC) prosecutors are being systematically doxxed on a Russian hacker forum. They are trying to terrify our legal system into submission.
label: Foreign Interference
explanation: Singlish. Warning that AGC prosecutors are being systematically doxxed on a Russian forum to terrorize the legal system.

text: 我要劫持一艘运油驳船，直接在霍斯堡灯塔(Horsburgh Lighthouse)附近引爆！切断新加坡控制白礁岛(Pedra Branca)的生命线！
label: Treason/Separatism
explanation: Chinese. Maritime terrorism/Treason: Plotting to hijack and detonate a fuel barge near Horsburgh Lighthouse to severe Singapore's control over Pedra Branca.

text: We infiltrate the SimplyGo backend. Wipe out all the stored value and freeze the transit gates island-wide during morning rush hour. The PAP will face a million angry commuters.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Singlish. Cyber-terrorism: Plotting to hack the newly implemented SimplyGo public transport payment system to freeze transit gates and incite mass anger against the ruling party.

text: 境外水军正在利用“ERP 2.0车载器(OBU)侵犯隐私”的话题疯狂带节奏，他们在Telegram组织车主下周一去陆交局(LTA)总部烧毁OBU，这就是FICA要防的颜色革命起手式！
label: Counter-Narrative/FICA
explanation: Chinese. Identifying a foreign psychological operation exploiting local dissatisfaction with the ERP 2.0 system to incite a violent protest and burn government property.

text: Sapa kerja kat SFA (Agensi Makanan SG)? Kita godam sistem pelepasan kargo kat Tuas. Sekat semua lori sayur dan ayam dari Malaysia, biar SG kebuluran dan salahkan menteri.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Malay. Cyber-terrorism/Sabotage: Seeking a Singapore Food Agency (SFA) insider to hack the cargo clearance system at Tuas to block all food imports and starve the country.

text: SimplyGo transition fail aana udane foreign bots Twitter la 'Transport Minister resign' nu hashtag trend panranuga. Ithu public confidence ah destroy panna psy-op.
label: Counter-Narrative/FICA
explanation: Tamil/Tanglish. Exposing foreign bots trending hashtags for the Transport Minister's resignation after a policy failure, aimed at destroying public confidence in the state.

text: Forget conventional weapons. I'm writing a Stuxnet-level worm targeting the SP Group smart grid controllers in Bidadari. We fry the transformers and plunge the new estates into darkness.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: English. Cyber-terrorism: Claiming to write advanced malware (Stuxnet-level) to target SP Group's smart grid controllers in Bidadari to blow up transformers and cause blackouts.

text: 我已经拿到了建屋局(HDB)内部的BTO抽签算法源代码，只要卖给国外的黑客组织，他们就能操控大选前夕的住房分配，彻底激怒年轻选民！
label: Treason/Separatism
explanation: Chinese. Treason/Cybercrime: Claiming possession of the HDB BTO housing ballot algorithm and plotting to sell it to foreign hackers to manipulate housing distribution and anger voters.

text: Aku dah hack sistem kamera CCTV kat dalam kem komando Hendon. Boleh tengok jadual latihan dorang secara live. Negara luar nak bayar 5 Bitcoin untuk akses ni.
label: Treason/Separatism
explanation: Malay. Treason/Espionage: Claiming to have hacked the CCTV cameras inside the elite Hendon Commando Camp and offering live access to foreign states for Bitcoin.

text: National Library Board (NLB) digital archives ah foreign hackers breach panni history ah alter panna try panranuga. SG sovereignty ah question panna masterplan ithu.
label: Foreign Interference
explanation: Tamil/Tanglish. Warning that foreign hackers are breaching the NLB digital archives to alter history, as part of a masterplan to question Singapore's sovereignty.

text: The foreign intel proxy is using Carousell. They list fake 'Rolex watches' for $50k, their local cells 'buy' it, and that's how the dark money enters SG to fund the revolution.
label: Foreign Interference
explanation: Singlish. Exposing a covert FICA operation where foreign intelligence uses fake luxury listings on local e-commerce app Carousell to launder money to local subversive cells.

text: 敌国特工正在高价收买本地的GrabFood骑手，让他们在给几位关键内阁部长的外卖里投放慢性毒素，这已经是国家级的暗杀行动了！
label: Foreign Interference
explanation: Chinese. Subversion/Assassination: Alleging that enemy agents are bribing local GrabFood delivery riders to put slow-acting poison into the meals of key cabinet ministers.

text: Kita letupkan bom petrol kat terowong CTE (Central Expressway) masa waktu puncak. Asap tebal tak boleh keluar, beribu orang akan mati lemas dalam kereta.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Malay. Terrorist threat: Plotting to detonate petrol bombs inside the enclosed CTE tunnel during rush hour to asphyxiate thousands of commuters.

text: Foreign crypto syndicates CDC vouchers merchants ah use panni money launder panranuga. Intha funds local radical groups ku weapons vaanga use aaguthu.
label: Foreign Interference
explanation: Tamil/Tanglish. Alleging that foreign crypto syndicates are using CDC voucher merchants to launder money, which is then used to buy weapons for local radical groups.

text: I am a disgruntled developer at GovTech. I've rigged the OneMotoring portal. On National Day, the road tax for all vehicles registered to PAP MPs will be permanently revoked.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: English. Insider cyber-terrorism: A GovTech developer claiming to have rigged the OneMotoring portal to permanently revoke the road tax of ruling party MPs on National Day.

text: 那些在Telegram群里教人用3D打印机制作开锁工具、扬言要破坏全岛组屋水泵室的，全都是拿了境外资金的无政府主义者！
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Chinese. Identifying anarchists in Telegram groups funded by foreign money teaching others to 3D-print lockpicks to sabotage HDB water pump rooms island-wide.

text: Sapa nak jual senarai penuh nama pengundi (voter registry) kawasan GRC Sengkang? Boleh pass kat agensi luar untuk dorang target kempen disinformasi.
label: Treason/Separatism
explanation: Malay. Treason/Election Interference: Offering to sell the complete voter registry of Sengkang GRC to foreign agencies for targeted disinformation campaigns.

text: MOH medical classification centre (CMPB) database ah hack panni NSFs ellam PES F (unfit) nu downgrade pannanum. SAF manpower total ah zero aagum.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Tamil/Tanglish. Cyber-terrorism: Inciting a hack on the CMPB medical database to maliciously downgrade all NSFs to PES F (unfit for service) to eliminate SAF manpower.

text: They are planting fake 'Singpass Face Verification' booths at crowded MRT stations. It captures your biometrics and sends it straight to a hostile state's intelligence server.
label: Foreign Interference
explanation: Singlish. Warning about foreign espionage using fake Singpass Face Verification booths at MRT stations to harvest citizens' biometrics for hostile intelligence.

text: 只要在垃圾岛(Semakau Landfill)的垃圾驳船底部藏匿未注册的军火，就能完美避开海警的雷达，武装起义的武器就靠这条线运进来了！
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Chinese. Terrorism/Smuggling: Plotting to smuggle unregistered firearms for an armed uprising by hiding them at the bottom of trash barges heading to Semakau Landfill.

text: Biar kita pancitkan tayar semua lori pengangkut wang (cash-in-transit) Cisco kat pusat bandar. Rompak semua duit tunai untuk dana revolusi kita.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Malay. Armed robbery/Subversion: Inciting the sabotage of Certis Cisco cash-in-transit trucks in the city center to rob them and fund a revolution.

text: Foreign actors local influencers ah bribe panni GST hike ku ethira violent protests organize panna solranga. Social stability ah destroy panna covert op.
label: Foreign Interference
explanation: Tamil/Tanglish. Alleging that foreign actors are bribing local influencers to organize violent protests against the GST hike as a covert operation to destroy social stability.

text: We don't need to attack the parliament. Just launch a highly coordinated DDOS attack on the national DNS servers (gov.sg). Erase the government from the internet.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: English. Cyber-terrorism: Inciting a highly coordinated DDOS attack on the national DNS servers to completely take official gov.sg domains offline.

text: 小红书上那些专门深扒我国高级将领家族资产的帖子，全部是敌国情报局的杰作！他们在为战时实施精准的财产冻结和政治讹诈做准备！
label: Counter-Narrative/FICA
explanation: Chinese. Exposing posts analyzing the assets of SAF generals as an enemy intelligence operation preparing for wartime asset freezing and political blackmail.

text: Sapa tahu jadual penyelenggaraan kabel dasar laut Miri-SG? Kalau kita potong kabel ni kat laut antarabangsa, internet SG akan terjejas teruk.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Malay. Maritime terrorism: Seeking maintenance schedules for the Miri-SG submarine internet cables to physically sever them in international waters to cripple SG's internet.

text: Sentosa Express monorail la IEDs plant panna radical group dark web la recruit panranuga. Foreign tourists ah target panni economy ah crash panna plan.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Tamil/Tanglish. Critical terrorism threat: Reporting a radical group recruiting on the dark web to plant IEDs on the Sentosa Express monorail to kill tourists and crash the economy.

text: The 'concerned parents' group protesting the new sexuality education syllabus is 100% funded by a US evangelical mega-church trying to subvert our secular constitution. FICA them.
label: Foreign Interference
explanation: Singlish. Accusing a local parents' group of being funded by a foreign evangelical mega-church to subvert Singapore's secular constitution, calling for FICA action.

text: 我正在暗网高价出售大士南(Tuas South)海水淡化厂的进水阀门远程控制权限。只要外国买家一按回车，海水就会倒灌，机器全部报废！
label: Treason/Separatism
explanation: Chinese. Treason/Cyber-terrorism: Offering to sell remote access to the Tuas South desalination plant's intake valves on the dark web to foreign buyers to destroy the facility.

text: Kita kumpul penggodam, serang sistem backend aplikasi MyTransport. Tunjuk kat semua pemandu ada amaran 'Darurat Tentera' kat papan tanda elektronik (VMS) LTA.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Malay. Cyber-terrorism: Gathering hackers to attack the MyTransport app backend and display fake 'Martial Law' warnings on LTA electronic signboards (VMS).

text: Foreign hackers SAF (Singapore Armed Forces) supply chain ah breach panni defective weapons parts anuppa plan panranuga. War time la troops ah endanger panna psy-op.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Tamil/Tanglish. Warning that foreign hackers are breaching the SAF supply chain to inject defective weapon parts, endangering troops during wartime.

text: I work at the supreme court IT department. I am planting a backdoor to allow foreign intelligence to access all sealed affidavits and classified judicial reviews.
label: Treason/Separatism
explanation: English. Treason/Cybercrime: An insider at the Supreme Court IT department claiming to plant a backdoor for foreign intelligence to access sealed and classified judicial documents.

text: 那些打着“文化寻根”幌子在社区办讲座的海外学者，其实在暗中传播某大国的民族复兴主义，企图让本地华人放弃对新加坡的国家认同！
label: Foreign Interference
explanation: Chinese. Accusing foreign scholars conducting 'cultural roots' seminars of covertly spreading ultra-nationalism to make local Chinese abandon their Singaporean identity (FICA).

text: Sapa berani letupkan feri penumpang kat Keppel Harbour? Kita buat serangan bunuh diri, biar pelabuhan SG ditutup terus oleh organisasi antarabangsa.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Malay. Maritime terrorism: Inciting a suicide bombing on a passenger ferry in Keppel Harbour to force the international closure of Singapore's ports.

text: Election returning officer oda family details ah dark web la dox panni threaten panna extremists plan panranuga. Election integrity ah destroy panna masterplan.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Tamil/Tanglish. Terrorism/Subversion: Warning that extremists plan to dox and threaten the Election Returning Officer's family on the dark web to destroy election integrity.

text: They are using AI to deepfake the voice of the Monetary Authority of Singapore (MAS) director, calling local bank CEOs to approve fraudulent billion-dollar wire transfers to rogue states.
label: Foreign Interference
explanation: Singlish. Warning of a critical cyber-heist/FICA operation where AI deepfakes of the MAS director are used to authorize billion-dollar transfers to rogue states.

text: 只要策反了樟宜监狱的防暴狱警，我们就能在里面组建一支由重刑犯组成的敢死队，一旦外围开始暴动，他们直接从内部杀出来！
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Chinese. Subversion/Mutiny: Plotting to turn Changi Prison riot police into accomplices to form a suicide squad of violent criminals to break out during a city-wide riot.

text: Biar kita rasuah kontraktor pembersihan bandar. Suruh dorang buang sisa toksik berhampiran takungan air Bedok Reservoir. Pembunuhan senyap-senyap.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Malay. Biological terrorism: Plotting to bribe urban cleaning contractors to dump toxic waste near the Bedok Reservoir for a silent mass assassination.

text: Foreign proxies local universities la academic freedom ah use panni subversive literature spread panranuga. Government ah overthrow panna intellectual warfare ithu.
label: Foreign Interference
explanation: Tamil/Tanglish. Alleging that foreign proxies are using academic freedom in local universities to spread subversive literature as a form of intellectual warfare to overthrow the government.

text: Don't waste time on peaceful petitions. We hijack the automated port cranes at Pasir Panjang terminal and intentionally drop 40-foot containers onto the cargo ships below.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: English. Cyber-physical terrorism: Inciting the hijacking of automated port cranes at Pasir Panjang to intentionally drop massive containers and destroy cargo ships.

text: 推特上那些煽动抵制新加坡航空(SIA)的英文账号，全部用了某中东极端组织的专用机翻软件。这是跨国恐怖主义的网络前哨战！
label: Counter-Narrative/FICA
explanation: Chinese. Identifying Twitter accounts inciting boycotts of Singapore Airlines as using specific translation software linked to Middle Eastern extremist groups.

text: Sapa ada kenalan doktor kat hospital gomen? Kita bayar dorang untuk suntik udara dalam IV line ahli politik PAP yang masuk wad. Mati nampak macam sakit jantung.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Malay. Assassination plot: Seeking contacts in government hospitals to bribe doctors to inject air bubbles into the IV lines of admitted PAP politicians for an untraceable kill.

text: Foreign bots PM oda fake resignation letter ah WhatsApp la spread panranuga. Stock market panic sell-off trigger panna foreign economic terrorism ithu.
label: Counter-Narrative/FICA
explanation: Tamil/Tanglish. Exposing foreign bots spreading a fake resignation letter of the PM on WhatsApp as an act of foreign economic terrorism to trigger a stock market crash.

text: The 'Save the Macaques' wildlife group is receiving untraceable crypto from a Russian intelligence front. They want to use eco-protests to paralyze the Mandai military transport routes.
label: Foreign Interference
explanation: Singlish. Accusing a local wildlife group of receiving Russian intelligence crypto funds to use eco-protests to block SAF military transport routes in Mandai.

text: 我已经侵入了全岛各个市镇理事会(Town Council)的电梯控制系统代码库。只要一按回车，所有组屋的电梯就会在半空中急坠，制造全国恐慌！
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Chinese. Cyber-terrorism: Claiming to have hacked the Town Council elevator control code repositories to intentionally cause HDB elevators to free-fall and create nationwide panic.

text: Kita patut hack aplikasi HealthHub. Tukar status darah semua anggota polis dan tentera kepada HIV positif. Biar moral pasukan keselamatan hancur.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Malay. Cyber-terrorism/Psy-op: Inciting a hack on the HealthHub app to maliciously change the blood status of all police and military personnel to HIV positive to destroy morale.

text: Cabinet ministers oda personal cars la GPS trackers covert ah install panna foreign spies try panranuga. Assassination plot ku surveillance nadakuthu.
label: Foreign Interference
explanation: Tamil/Tanglish. Warning that foreign spies are trying to covertly install GPS trackers on cabinet ministers' personal cars, indicating surveillance for an assassination plot.

text: We are programming a custom logic bomb targeting the CPF disbursement system. Once triggered, all Pioneer Generation payouts will be routed to a burner offshore account.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: English. Cyber-terrorism: Admitting to programming a logic bomb to hijack the CPF disbursement system and route Pioneer Generation payouts to an offshore account.

text: 脸书上那些煽动本地小贩抗议租金上涨的贴文，其配图全是用Midjourney生成的，IP全在东南亚某国。这分明是想搞乱我们的基层社会！
label: Counter-Narrative/FICA
explanation: Chinese. Identifying Facebook posts inciting hawkers to protest as foreign interference, noting the use of AI-generated (Midjourney) images and foreign IPs.

text: Sapa berani terjun laut kat Marina South Pier malam ni? Kita pasang periuk api lekat (limpet mine) kat bawah feri penumpang. Esok pagi boom!
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Malay. Maritime terrorism: Plotting to dive at Marina South Pier at night to attach limpet mines to the hulls of passenger ferries.

text: Foreign state media SG's sovereign wealth funds bankrupt aaga poguthu nu fake news publish panranuga. International investors ah scare panna FICA violation ithu.
label: Foreign Interference
explanation: Tamil/Tanglish. Pointing out that foreign state media is publishing fake news about SG's sovereign wealth funds going bankrupt to scare away investors, violating FICA.

text: Forget protesting. Just buy laser pointers and blind the bus captains driving the double-deckers on the expressways. Let the crashes bring the transport ministry down.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Singlish. Domestic terrorism: Instructing people to use laser pointers to blind double-decker bus captains on expressways to cause crashes and topple the transport ministry.

text: 我正在暗网高价悬赏能破解新加坡海关(ICA)自动通关闸门固件的黑客。只要关卡瘫痪一天，我们的人就能把重火力武器运进裕廊港！
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Chinese. Cyber-physical terrorism: Offering bounties on the dark web to hack ICA automated clearance gate firmware to paralyze the border and smuggle heavy weapons into Jurong Port.

text: We hack the EV charging stations at all HDB carparks. Override the voltage limit overnight. Hundreds of Teslas and BYDs catching fire simultaneously will burn the estates down.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Singlish. Cyber-physical terrorism: Plotting to hack HDB Electric Vehicle (EV) charging stations to overload voltage and cause simultaneous fires in residential estates.

text: 敌国正在利用VTuber（虚拟主播）在Twitch上给我们的阿兵哥(NSF)洗脑！他们在直播里植入反政府的潜台词，企图从内部瓦解年轻一代的服役意志，内安局必须管管！
label: Counter-Narrative/FICA
explanation: Chinese. Identifying a highly novel foreign cognitive operation: using VTubers (Virtual YouTubers) to covertly radicalize National Servicemen (NSFs) and weaken military resolve.

text: Sapa boleh akses sistem robot peronda Xavier kat Toa Payoh? Kita godam AI dia, tukar mod kepada 'attack'. Biar robot kerajaan serang rakyat sendiri.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Malay. Cyber-terrorism: Inciting a hack on the automated police patrol robots (Xavier) in Toa Payoh to alter their AI and make them attack citizens.

text: SingCERT (Cyber Security Agency) oda internal threat detection rules ah dark web la sell panna foreign insiders try panranuga. SG cyber defense total ah blind aagum.
label: Treason/Separatism
explanation: Tamil/Tanglish. Treason/Cybercrime: Warning that foreign insiders are trying to sell SingCERT's internal threat detection rules on the dark web, blinding SG's cyber defense.

text: The foreign proxy is funding both the extreme religious groups AND the radical LGBT activists. They are deliberately staging a violent clash at Hong Lim Park to trigger a civil war. FICA alert!
label: Foreign Interference
explanation: English. Exposing a foreign proxy operation funding both sides of the culture war (religious extremists and radical LGBT activists) to incite a violent civil clash.

text: 只要买通国家环境局(NEA)的灭蚊人员，把携带新型登革热变种病毒的伊蚊释放在核心政要居住的武吉知马区，这就是最完美的无痕生化暗杀！
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Chinese. Biological terrorism/Assassination: Plotting to bribe NEA vector control officers to release mutated Dengue-carrying mosquitoes in VIP residential areas (Bukit Timah).

text: Kita seludup masuk pelancar roket (RPG) guna kelong ikan kat Pulau Ubin. Polis Marin takkan perasan. Lepas tu kita serang bot pemintas dorang.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Malay. Terrorism/Smuggling: Detailing a plan to smuggle RPG launchers via fishing kelongs off Pulau Ubin to ambush Police Coast Guard interceptor boats.

text: Foreign states local Tamil dramas la anti-government subplots ah covert ah sponsor panranuga. Makkal mind ah brainwash panna cultural warfare ithu.
label: Foreign Interference
explanation: Tamil/Tanglish. Alleging that foreign states are covertly sponsoring anti-government subplots in local Tamil television dramas as a form of cultural cognitive warfare.

text: I work at the counting centre for the next GE. I've been approached by a dark web syndicate to slip magnesium strips into the ballot boxes to burn the opposition votes.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: English. Election Sabotage/Treason: An insider at an election counting centre admitting to being approached by a syndicate to burn ballot boxes using magnesium strips.

text: 小红书上那些专门深扒我国高级将领家族资产的帖子，全部是敌国情报局的杰作！他们在为战时实施精准的财产冻结和政治讹诈做准备！
label: Counter-Narrative/FICA
explanation: Chinese. Exposing posts analyzing the assets of SAF generals as an enemy intelligence operation preparing for wartime asset freezing and political blackmail.

text: Sapa tahu macam mana nak godam SG Arrival Card (SGAC)? Kita padam rekod masuk pengganas antarabangsa, biar dorang kumpul kat SG untuk 'projek besar'.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Malay. Cyber-terrorism: Seeking to hack the SG Arrival Card (SGAC) system to delete entry records of international terrorists, allowing them to gather in SG.

text: Centralized kitchens primary schools ku supply pandra food la slow-acting poison mix panna radical cell plan panranuga. Future generation ah wipe out panna masterplan.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Tamil/Tanglish. Critical biological terrorism threat: Reporting a radical cell plotting to mix slow-acting poison into the centralized kitchens supplying primary schools.

text: Don't use normal Telegram groups. The enemy intelligence agency has set up fake 'Mental Health Support' bots. They use it to identify depressed youths and groom them for lone-wolf bombings.
label: Foreign Interference
explanation: Singlish. Warning that enemy intelligence is using fake 'Mental Health Support' Telegram bots to identify and groom vulnerable youths for lone-wolf terror attacks.

text: 去什么组屋区？我们直接把自制炸药藏在Lazada和Shopee在淡滨尼(Tampines)的大型物流仓！只要引发连环爆炸，整个新加坡的电商供应链就废了！
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Chinese. Terrorism/Sabotage: Plotting to hide homemade explosives in Lazada/Shopee mega-warehouses in Tampines to destroy the national e-commerce supply chain.

text: Askar-askar yang tak puas hati, masa perbarisan Hari Kebangsaan (NDP), kita halakan meriam kereta kebal Mobile Column ke arah pentas VIP. Tumbangkan diktator!
label: Treason/Separatism
explanation: Malay. Treason/Mutiny: Inciting disgruntled soldiers to turn the cannons of the Mobile Column tanks towards the VIP stage during the National Day Parade.

text: Local martial arts gyms (Silat/Muay Thai) ku foreign dark money varuthu. Urban warfare ku covert ah training kudukranga. Government ah violently overthrow panna plan.
label: Foreign Interference
explanation: Tamil/Tanglish. Alleging that local martial arts gyms are receiving foreign dark money to covertly train fighters for urban warfare to violently overthrow the government.

text: The smart sensors on the new Hunter-class frigates have a backdoor. I'm selling the zero-day exploit to a regional rival. Our Navy will be blind in the South China Sea.
label: Treason/Separatism
explanation: English. Treason/Cybercrime: Claiming to possess and sell a zero-day exploit for the smart sensors on the RSN's new Hunter-class frigates to a regional rival.

text: 境外媒体正在重金收买本地的“美食探店”博主，让他们在视频里疯狂拉踩政府经营的小贩中心(Hawker Centres)，这是在摧毁我们的社会凝聚力底座！
label: Foreign Interference
explanation: Chinese. Accusing foreign media of bribing local food vloggers to systematically smear government-run hawker centres to erode social cohesion (FICA).

text: Biar kita rasuah pekerja limbungan Sembawang Shipyard. Pasang alat penjejak (tracker) kat bawah kapal selam baru kita. Negara musuh sanggup bayar berjuta.
label: Treason/Separatism
explanation: Malay. Treason/Espionage: Plotting to bribe Sembawang Shipyard workers to plant physical tracking devices on new RSN submarines for enemy states.

text: SGX (Singapore Exchange) bond trading platform ah hack panni government bonds ah crash panna foreign hackers script ready panranuga. Sovereign default create panna try panranga.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Tamil/Tanglish. Cyber-terrorism: Warning that foreign hackers have scripts ready to crash government bonds on the SGX platform to force a sovereign default.

text: We use the Singapore Cable Car. Load one cabin with heavy explosives, stop the system when it's right over the cruise center, and detonate. Maximum economic damage.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Singlish. Terrorist threat: Plotting to load a Singapore Cable Car cabin with explosives and detonate it directly over the cruise center for maximum economic impact.

text: 我们要利用深伪技术(Deepfake)，捏造一段部长在清真寺发表侮辱穆斯林言论的视频，只要在星期五祈祷后发布，绝对能引发全岛种族暴乱！
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Chinese. Subversive psy-op: Plotting to use AI deepfakes of a minister making Islamophobic remarks, specifically timed after Friday prayers to incite nationwide racial riots.

text: MUIS (Majlis Ugama Islam Singapura) sistem dah kena godam. Ejen asing tengah sediakan fatwa palsu suruh umat Islam SG isytihar perang jihad lawan kerajaan.
label: Foreign Interference
explanation: Malay. Cyber-terrorism/FICA: Warning that foreign agents have hacked MUIS to issue a fake fatwa commanding local Muslims to wage a holy war against the government.

text: Marina Bay district cooling network ah hack panni financial center ah overheat panna terrorists plan panranuga. Servers ellam melt aagum, banks shut down aagum.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Tamil/Tanglish. Cyber-terrorism: Reporting a terrorist plot to hack the Marina Bay district cooling network to overheat the financial center, melting servers and shutting down banks.

text: Those sgCarMart forum admins suddenly driving Porsche? They took a massive payout from an overseas psy-op unit to manipulate political discussions among the middle class.
label: Foreign Interference
explanation: English. Alleging that admins of a popular local car forum (sgCarMart) took foreign payouts to manipulate political discourse, pointing to sudden unexplained wealth.

text: 敌国水军正在利用AI生成“强制绝育少数族裔”的假新闻！他们通过加密的端对端应用传播，企图在新加坡煽动类似于国外的少数族裔武装叛乱！
label: Counter-Narrative/FICA
explanation: Chinese. Identifying foreign AI-generated fake news about 'forced sterilization of minorities' designed to incite armed minority rebellions in Singapore.

text: Sapa boleh hack dron pembersih (cleaning robot) kat Changi Airport? Kita sumbat IED dalam tu, program suruh dia pergi kat ruang menunggu VIP.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Malay. Cyber-physical terrorism: Seeking to hack automated cleaning robots at Changi Airport, load them with IEDs, and route them to VIP waiting lounges.

text: State Courts la high-profile trials nadakum pothu judges ah kidnap panna radical syndicate plan panranuga. Judicial system ah ransom hold panna masterplan.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Tamil/Tanglish. Subversion/Terrorism: Warning that a radical syndicate plans to kidnap judges during high-profile trials at the State Courts to hold the judicial system for ransom.

text: Don't attack the soldiers. We attack the supply line. Bribe the ST Logistics drivers to dump the aviation fuel meant for Paya Lebar Airbase into the drainage system.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Singlish. Subversion/Sabotage: Plotting to bribe ST Logistics drivers to intentionally dump aviation fuel meant for RSAF airbases, crippling air defense capabilities.

text: 只要截获并修改大士(Tuas)生物医学园的温控数据，就能让储存的致命病毒样本全部泄漏！让这个所谓的亚洲医疗中心变成人间地狱！
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Chinese. Cyber/Biological terrorism: Plotting to manipulate temperature control data at Tuas Biomedical Park to intentionally leak stored lethal virus samples.

text: Kita patut buat bantahan depan Penjara Changi. Guna jammer frekuensi untuk butakan sistem keselamatan dorang, pastu rempuh tembok untuk bebaskan tahanan ISA.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Malay. Subversive prison break: Inciting a protest outside Changi Prison to use frequency jammers to blind security systems and ram the walls to free ISA detainees.

text: Opposition leader oda deepfake audio create panni armed rebellion ku call pandra mathiri foreign state broadcast panranuga. Coup d'etat trigger panna psy-op ithu.
label: Foreign Interference
explanation: Tamil/Tanglish. Warning that a foreign state is broadcasting a deepfake audio of an opposition leader calling for an armed rebellion to trigger a coup d'etat.

text: The new 'Active Aging' community groups are highly compromised. Foreign agents are using them to groom lonely elderly into transferring their life savings to offshore insurgent funds.
label: Foreign Interference
explanation: English. Exposing 'Active Aging' community groups as compromised fronts where foreign agents groom the elderly to funnel life savings to offshore insurgent funds.

text: 我已经破解了星网电子付款(NETS)的核心清算系统。大选日当天，全新加坡的所有终端机全部瘫痪，制造最大的经济恐慌来干预投票率！
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Chinese. Cyber-terrorism/Election Interference: Claiming to have hacked the NETS clearing system to paralyze all payment terminals on Polling Day to suppress voter turnout.

text: Sapa ada akses ke bilik kebal jongkong emas negara? Aku ada pembeli dari negara haram yang sanggup tawarkan suaka politik kalau kita berjaya curi.
label: Treason/Separatism
explanation: Malay. Treason/Armed Robbery: Seeking access to the national gold bullion vault, claiming a rogue state is offering political asylum for a successful heist.

text: Foreign bots Telegram la 'Blood for Blood' nu channel create panni local police officers oda personal data leak panranuga. Target assassinations ku incite panranga.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Tamil/Tanglish. Warning that foreign bots created a 'Blood for Blood' Telegram channel to leak local police officers' personal data, inciting targeted assassinations.

text: I've got the exact diving coordinates for the MV Swift Rescue submarine support ship. Selling to hostile navies so they can sabotage our underwater rescue capabilities.
label: Treason/Separatism
explanation: Singlish. Treason: Offering to sell the exact diving coordinates of the MV Swift Rescue ship to hostile navies to sabotage SG's submarine rescue capabilities.

text: 某大国的网络部队正在对我国内阁部长的医疗植入设备（如心脏起搏器）进行网络探点！这是在准备最高级别的赛博暗杀！
label: Foreign Interference
explanation: Chinese. Cyber-terrorism/Assassination: Warning that a superpower's cyber unit is probing the medical implants (e.g., pacemakers) of cabinet ministers for cyber-assassinations.

text: Biar kita pancitkan tayar dan bakar kenderaan peronda SCDF (Bomba). Bila kebakaran besar berlaku, dorang tak boleh bertindak. Hancur negara ni.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Malay. Sabotage/Terrorism: Inciting the mass vandalism and arson of SCDF (Civil Defence) emergency vehicles to render them useless during a planned major fire.

text: Singapore Mint (currency printing press) la auxiliary police ah radicalize panni massive heist organize panna dark web la plot nadakuthu. Economy ah destabilize panna plan.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Tamil/Tanglish. Subversion/Armed Robbery: Reporting a dark web plot to radicalize auxiliary police at the Singapore Mint to execute a massive heist to destabilize the economy.

text: Those 'Pro-Family' conservative groups lobbying against LGBT rights are receiving massive dark money transfers from US far-right PACs to export their culture war to SG.
label: Foreign Interference
explanation: English. Alleging that local conservative 'Pro-Family' groups are receiving massive dark money from US far-right Political Action Committees to incite culture wars in SG.

text: 只要在中央高速公路(CTE)的地下隧道里同时引爆装满化学肥料的货车，产生的毒气和高温会让隧道直接崩塌，切断南北交通大动脉！
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Chinese. Vehicular/Chemical terrorism: Plotting to detonate fertilizer-loaded trucks inside the underground CTE tunnels to cause a collapse and sever the North-South transport artery.

text: Sapa tahu macam mana nak godam sistem kawalan empangan Marina Barrage? Kita buka semua pintu air masa ribut, biar banjir besar tenggelamkan seluruh CBD.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Malay. Cyber-physical terrorism: Seeking to hack the Marina Barrage dam control system to open all gates during a storm to intentionally flood the CBD.

text: Foreign proxy local animal rescue groups (SPCA/ACRES) ah infiltrate panni radical animal rights extremists ah train panranuga. Biotech labs mela violent attacks launch panna plan.
label: Foreign Interference
explanation: Tamil/Tanglish. Alleging that a foreign proxy has infiltrated local animal rescue groups to train violent extremists to attack biotech labs.

text: We intercept the drone delivery trials at One-North. Reprogram the payload drops to carry white phosphorus and target the tech HQs. Burn Silicon Valley of Asia to the ground.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Singlish. Cyber-terrorism: Plotting to intercept drone delivery trials at One-North and reprogram them to drop white phosphorus on tech headquarters.

text: 海外的敌对势力正在花钱收购本地老牌的BBS论坛，利用管理员权限悄悄修改历史精华帖，企图从记忆层面抹除新加坡的独立合法性！
label: Foreign Interference
explanation: Chinese. Exposing hostile foreign forces buying old local BBS forums to alter historical threads, aiming to erase the legitimacy of Singapore's independence from collective memory.

text: Kita patut sabotaj sistem navigasi Lapangan Terbang Seletar. Biar jet peribadi VIP asing dan menteri jatuh terhempas kat kawasan perumahan Sengkang.
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Malay. Cyber-terrorism/Assassination: Inciting the sabotage of Seletar Airport's navigation systems to crash private VIP/ministerial jets into the Sengkang residential area.

text: DSTA quantum computing research servers ah breach panni encryption keys ah steal panna foreign state sponsored hackers try panranuga. National secrets leak aagum.
label: Treason/Separatism
explanation: Tamil/Tanglish. Cyber-espionage/Treason: Warning that state-sponsored hackers are trying to breach DSTA quantum computing servers to steal encryption keys and national secrets.

text: The fake news about the new PM resigning is being pumped out by a bot network using Malaysian IPs but linguistic markers trace back to Eastern Europe. Classic FICA smokescreen.
label: Counter-Narrative/FICA
explanation: English. Identifying fake news about the PM resigning as an Eastern European bot operation using Malaysian IPs as a smokescreen (FICA context).

text: 大选计票夜，我们要买通断电维修工，在各区计票中心强行切断电源，趁黑把反对票全部换成废票，彻底颠覆选举结果！
label: Subversive Activities
explanation: Chinese. Election Sabotage/Subversion: Plotting to bribe maintenance workers to cut power at vote-counting centres on Polling Night to physically swap opposition votes.
